subcodes.first_line: O thou binder of books! Shouldst thou refer to the heavenly Books and Sacred Scriptures, and ponder the meanings enshrined therein
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صحاف چون بصحف الهیه و صحائف ربانیه رجوع نماای و در معانی مندمجه مندرجه در
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures
